headline: Assessing AutoZone (AZO) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: AutoZone stock reacts to recent performance AutoZone (AZO) has been under pressure recently, with the share price down about 1.8% over the past day, 7.9% over the past week, and 12.3% over the past month. See our latest analysis for AutoZone. At a share price of $3,282.90, AutoZone’s 30 day share price return of 12.33% and 1 year total shareholder return of 8.97% contrast with a much stronger 3 year total shareholder return of 40.93%, suggesting momentum has cooled after a strong multi year...
